§6Pumpjack§f is an advanced automated oil extraction device providing §ahigher efficiency§f than derricks.

§eSetup:§f
• Place directly on §boil deposit§f
• Connect to fluid pipes or tanks
• Supply power for continuous operation

§eAdvantages over Derrick:§f
• §aFaster extraction rate§f
• §aMore efficient§f on large deposits
• §aFully automated§f - set and forget

§aTips:§f
• Use multiple pumpjacks on massive deposits
• Connect to §bIndustrial Boiler§f for hot oil chain
• Consider §bFracking Tower§f for depleted deposits
